title: Red Pier
actors: Yûjirô Ishihara, Mie Kitahara, Yukiko Todoroki
plot: 50s subculture icon Yujiro Ishihara (Crazed Fruit) stars in Masuda's Red Pier as "Jiro the Lefty", a killer with a natural talent. Shortly after arriving in Kobe, he witnesses a man die in a crane accident which turns out to be a ...
